segments.text: I wonder if Light was maybe a nice little stall there, over-respecting Raru a bit,
because he almost always goes for the jab reset on default, and then reacts to tech options.
Yeah, a little surprising, but still though, just...

full_text: I wonder if Light was maybe a nice little stall there, over-respecting Raru a bit, because he almost always goes for the jab reset on default, and then reacts to tech options. Yeah, a little surprising, but still though, just...
